message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "client" as C
participant "auth_service" as AS
participant "IDP" as IDP
participant "Gatekeeper" as G
participant "PASTA_service" as PASTA
participant "LDAP" as LDAP

C ->> G : "request" as public
G ->> G: generate internal (public) token
G ->> PASTA : "request" internal (public) token
PASTA ->> G: authorize service
PASTA ->> G: authorize resource
PASTA ->> G: perform service
PASTA ->> G: "response"
G ->> G: drop internal (public) token
G ->> C: "response"

@enduml
